text: The SCSA (Ship Security Assessment) report shall consist of the following:

options.text: A description of countermeasures that could be used to address vulnerability
Crew wage scales and financial portfolios

explanation: The Ship Security Assessment (SSA) report, mandated by the ISPS Code, identifies vulnerabilities and outlines potential countermeasures. It includes an on-scene survey, an analysis of threats and vulnerabilities, and a description of protective measures, personnel, procedures, and equipment that could mitigate identified risks.
